source_pipeline: configs/countries/us.yaml → sync_socrata.py + sync_census_popest.py → raw.us_sf_* → dbt_us_staging → dbt_us_analytics → dbt_us_marts → export_us_sf.py
perimeter: One row per vendor in the union of each fiscal year's top 1,000 payees by dollars (≈95-97% of every year's total). The full universe is ~71,700 raw vendor strings; the excluded tail is dollar-immaterial and contains most person-like names. byYear carries the vendor's complete per-FY sums, including years outside its top-1,000 appearances.
person_note: bucket='person' rows are individual payees (mostly landlords paid directly). The UI labels them 'individual payee' and never features them in rankings or suggestions.
